notes: Captured Admin GraphQL 2026-04 fileCreate for 60 image files so timestamp fields cross the one-minute boundary. The live fixture validates that Shopify returns parseable UTC DateTime strings for every created file; proxy comparison keeps file order, alt, fileStatus, userErrors, and timestamp field presence strict while allowing volatile file IDs and instants through matchers.

expectedDifferences.reason: The proxy generates stable local MediaImage GIDs; Shopify returns live dev-store MediaImage GIDs.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns live creation timestamps.
The proxy uses its deterministic staged timestamp sequence; Shopify returns live update timestamps.
